Get ready for the very first  SAGE: Escape Velocity Surge Event!

 Friday, May 12 - Monday, May 15
 12pm EST Friday - 12pm EST Monday
sage.staratlas.com

For 72hrs, the chances of coming across Silver Loot will be 5x higher, while the chances of encountering Gold Loot 15x higher!
